goal: Recalculate the BF3-TS2-B1 reverse intrinsic reaction coordinate with the same revised numerical protocol as the forward direction and extend beyond the first run's 30-point ceiling.
claim_scope: Numerically trace the reverse direction from the accepted C13-C21 first-order-saddle candidate. Do not assign reactant or product identity, claim an endpoint minimum, or validate the reaction path without endpoint review and the separately completed forward direction.

prior_run_evidence.termination_reason: Maximum number of points reached with normal reverse-path completion.
prior_run_evidence.review_limit: The final point was not thereby proven to be a minimum.
